why: BioConceptVec gives clinically useful atrial-fibrillation variants, while cui2vec-style heart-failure associations should not satisfy a default atrial-fibrillation lookup.
BioConceptVec gives heart-failure subtype neighbors; myocardial-infarction association drift belongs in an opt-in related panel, not default answers.
BioConceptVec can recover diabetes-type neighbors, while obesity/metabolic associations need source-aware review before promotion.
cui2vec carries useful metabolic-neighbor candidates for diabetes, but measurement-only neighbors should not become default disease answers.
The local cui2vec index contains high-score low-value drift such as Born in Germany; this is the guardrail case for keeping the source opt-in and filtered.
